title: Add nvm_failed: label in oscore_protect_request with OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED and wipe integration
description: Implement dedicated label nvm_failed: that sets ret = OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED, ensures crypto_wipe of sensitive buffers (nonce, piv, plaintext, seq), then returns. Integrate by having success path and error paths goto appropriate labels, updating the existing cleanup_protect_request to be common wipe if possible. Reference oscore.c:1524 and related security hardening. Update oscore.h docs.
